summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DeezLink e-commerce platform. All backend APIs working correctly with /api prefix. Frontend loads properly and integrates well with backend. Order flow functional through to OxaPay payment gateway.

minor_issues.issue: Some 401 unauthorized errors in console logs during page load
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - likely from auth state checks

ui_bugs.issue: Minor error message 'Oops!Closeclose' appears during order flow

passed_tests: GET /api/geo - returns geo location data (US, USD, $1.08 rate)
GET /api/loyalty/tiers - returns all 5 loyalty tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond)
POST /api/auth/login - admin login successful with admin@deezlink.com
POST /api/auth/magic - magic link request processed successfully
GET /api/admin/stats - returns admin statistics (20 demo links available)
Frontend homepage loads with DeezLink branding and offers
Navigation between Home and Offers pages working
Offers page displays 3 pack options (Single 5€, Family 20€, Custom pack)
Order form integration working - accepts email and processes orders
OxaPay payment integration working - redirects to payment gateway
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor cleanup: 1) Fix error message display ('Oops!Closeclose' formatting issue), 2) Investigate 401 console errors during page load (likely auth state checks)
